```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Absenteeism from school. Visualization of the distribution of count data.
# Packages
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(MASS)

# Data
data <- MASS::quine |>
  dplyr::rename_with(toupper)

# Plot
ggplot2::ggplot(data = data, aes(x = DAYS)) +
  ggplot2::geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::xlab(label = "Days") +
  ggplot2::ylab(label = "Frequency")
```
